rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). The rule text governs agricultural nonpoint source pollution under Agric. Code §201.026. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 201.026. NONPOINT SOURCE POLLUTION. (a) The state board is the lead agency in this state for activity relating to abating agricultural and silvicultural nonpoint source pollution.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this agricultural nonpoint source pollution statute.
